summary: Frontend-only testing for Clínica Dental Azorín landing page. All sections render correctly, all CTAs use correct hrefs (tel:+34947649546 and wa.me/34947649546), services tabs interactive (4/4), mobile menu works at 390x844, footer map + address + phone OK, Google Fonts (Playfair Display + Outfit) load, no console errors. One UX issue: the WhatsApp float button bottom-right is intercepted by Emergent platform badge on desktop (real user click blocked).

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent platform badge (#emergent-badge) intercepts pointer events on the floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner on desktop viewport. JS-triggered click works (card opens, href correct), but real user mouse clicks via Playwright are blocked by the overlapping badge. Users on desktop may be unable to open the WhatsApp chat card.

action_items: Reposition the WhatsApp float button to avoid overlap with the Emergent badge (e.g., change bottom-5 right-5 to bottom-24 right-5, or bottom-5 left-5) so real-user clicks are not intercepted by #emergent-badge.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsAppFloat positioned at bottom-5 right-5 collides with the platform Emergent badge in desktop view; click handler only fires via JS, not real pointer events. Move it up (bottom-24) or to the left.
All components are small focused files (<200 lines), clean separation, good use of data-testid. No DRY/file-size concerns observed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: landing-page wrapper, 8 section anchors, 5 nav links, hero + header + mobile + footer CTAs all use correct tel:/wa.me hrefs (947649546). Services 4 tabs (recuperar/estetica/salud/dolor) all toggle their respective panels. Mobile menu at 390x844 works with mobile-cta-link and mobile-call-link. WhatsApp float card opens/closes correctly when triggered (JS click) and whatsapp-float-start has correct wa.me href. 3 testimonials, 4 why-cards, 3 team cards (Alberto/Jennifer/Teresa) all render. Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Outfit) load. No console errors. ONLY ISSUE: Emergent badge (#emergent-badge) intercepts pointer events on the WhatsApp float button in bottom-right — recommended fix is to reposition the float (bottom-24 instead of bottom-5).
rca of the issue: WhatsAppFloat.jsx wraps the trigger in a fixed div at `bottom-5 right-5 z-50`. The Emergent platform badge is rendered globally at the same bottom-right area and sits on top, intercepting pointer events. JS-triggered clicks bypass this and work. Mitigation: increase the bottom offset (e.g., bottom-24) or move to the left, or set `pointer-events: none` on the wrapper while keeping `pointer-events: auto` on the button (only solves if positioning still avoids badge).
